title: Drink Beer Refill
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RZwVw5iA/images/0c5fbfd63336a30dae38b5190ec67f209351f32a.png)
## 🍺Descriptions:
Drink Beer now goes to Forge 1.19.2+, enjoy!  
This is an unofficial fork of Drink Beer forge mod, providing **full fabric-3.0.2 version features** in 1.19.2+ forge version and built-in JEI/Jade support, as well as other new features.  

### 🍺 About "providing full fabric-3.0.2 version features": 
1. Some features may be changed in current and future versions.
2. Will not port features after fabric-version 3.0.2, because the original project owner changed the license to All Right Reserved after that version.



## 🍺Why refill?
Reasons are simple:
* New ways to interact (e.g. Place Beer in Bartending Table and you'll see it)
* (Partial) Automation support by implementing Capability (e.g. All autiomation using item trasnfer things such as Hopper. For more infomation please check "How to ...?" Section)
* Extension and Compat With Other Mods (e.g. Keg support Alcocraft Recipe This is now suspended since alcocraft 1.19.2 crash problem, See issue Alcocraft#10）

## 🍺How to...?
### Brewing:
1.Prepare a keg and at least 4 empty beer mugs, open the brewing menu by right clicking on the keg block.  
2.Put ingredients into keg(the order of materials does not matter，e.g.，swapping the positions of apples and wheat in the gif below gets the same beer result).  
3.Once you decide which beer to brew,  put mugs in and start brewing.  
4. ...Brewing...  
5.Down the hatch!  
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RZwVw5iA/images/9748ab94beec22cb6454c068325a41495e1be3fe.gif)
Automation support: beer can be exported.  
 

### Bartering:
Barter items with residents from different places through bartering box, obtain unique spices for bartending!
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RZwVw5iA/images/7520ee9d69a04010158e3d8d506c8535b8a9d8c2.png)
Automation support: not implemented yet.  

### Bartending:
Right-click on the bartending table with beer in hand.  Place your beer on bartending and then put spices in! Discover hidden flavor combinations!  
Automation support: Beer and spice can be imported, and once a spice is added into beer, the beer will be able to be exported.

## 🍺Credit:
Thank following people for their amazing ground works!  
Lekavar and MarbleGateKeeper made 1.17.1 and previous official versions.  
Naetheline made 1.18.1 version and ported bartending & bartering features.  
yanang007 made 1.18.2 version.  
MarbleGateKeeper made JEI plugin.  
yanang007 made Jade integration.
